name: G2: Product Search
summary: Discover G2 products by keyword. Returns one row per unique product (deduplicated by URL).
description: Search G2 by keyword and return a deduplicated list of product candidates with name, URL, rating summary, and review count. Use when you need to discover product slugs to feed into g2/product-details-reviews.

search_query.description: Keyword or product name. Single-word category terms ("crm", "erp") may redirect to G2's category index page; product names ("intercom", "slack") hit the search results page.

inputs.script: const cleanArg = (v) => { const t = String(v == null ? '' : v).trim(); return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t) ? '' : t; }; const query = cleanArg(arg0); const norm = (v) => String(v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const anchors = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("a[href*='/products/'][href*='/reviews']")); const byProduct = new Map(); for (const a of anchors) { const url = a.href.replace(/#.*$/, '').replace(/\?.*$/, ''); const slugMatch = url.match(/\/products\/([^/]+)\/reviews/); if (!slugMatch) continue; const slug = slugMatch[1]; const text = norm(a.textContent); if (!byProduct.has(slug)) { byProduct.set(slug, { product_url: url, slug, candidates: [] }); } byProduct.get(slug).candidates.push(text); } const results = Array.from(byProduct.values()).map((entry) => { const named = entry.candidates.find((t) => t && !/^\d/.test(t) && t.length > 1); const ratingText = entry.candidates.find((t) => /\d(\.\d+)?\/5|\(\d/.test(t)) || ''; const ratingMatch = ratingText.match(/(\d(?:\.\d+)?)\s*\/\s*5/); const reviewMatch = ratingText.match(/\(([\d,]+)\)/); return { product_name: named || entry.slug.replace(/-/g, ' '), product_url: entry.product_url, rating: ratingMatch ? ratingMatch[1] : 'N/A', review_count: reviewMatch ? reviewMatch[1].replace(/,/g, '') : 'N/A' }; }); return { query: query || null, count: results.length, results };

help.summary: Discover G2 products by keyword. Returns one row per unique product (deduplicated by URL).

parameters.search_query: Keyword or product name. Single-word category terms ("crm", "erp") may redirect to G2's category index page; product names ("intercom", "slack") hit the search results page.

examples.description: Find products in a category (G2 may redirect to /categories/<slug>)

returns: Object: { query, count, results: [{ product_name, product_url, rating, review_count }] }. Feed product_url into g2/product-details-reviews.
notes: Dedup is by canonical product reviews URL (.../products/<slug>/reviews). Multiple anchors per card (image, name, rating) collapse to one row.
G2 sometimes redirects /search?query=<single-word-category> to /categories/<slug>. The selector works on both surfaces.
G2 has occasional bot detection on this surface; if results come back empty, open the search URL manually once to clear any challenge before re-running.
